channel.title: [Archive] Jono, Ben & Sharyn Catchup Podcast - The Edge
channel.itunes:subtitle: The Edge Afternoons with Jono, Ben & Sharyn [archive]
channel.description: BEYONCÉ LOVED THIS PODCAST! Two guys, a girl, and a pretty weird radio show! Join Jono, Ben and Sharyn for your daily dose of celeb interviews, banter, scandal, lols and all round randomness. DISCLAIMER: Beyoncé has never heard this podcast ... we were just trying to get your attention. [archive]
